overview.description: The IDX Dynamic Fixed Income ETF (DYFI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that invests broadly across various sectors of the fixed income markets around the world. Investment could include debt securities of various maturities and credit quality. DYFI was launched on Jan 10, 2024 and is issued by IDX.

data.title: DYFI, DYNI: Bond Market Opportunities & Bitcoin Halving
data.text: IDK Dynamix Fixed Income ETF (DYFI) was launched on January 10th. Ben McMillan discusses this, as well as finding opportunities in different aspects of the bond market.
